title: SAH Lite
description: Texture pack in 256p resolution compatible with MC from 1.15 to 1.21.4
body:
Texture pack in 256p resolution compatible with MC from 1.15 to 1.21.4. The assumption was to create a package thanks to which Minecraft will not only look great, but will also be playable. The package is not complete yet, but it is regularly supplemented and improved. **SAH-Lite** is a free, preview version of the package, containing a limited number of textures. **SAH Project** is the full version of the pack available on Patreon: https://patreon.com/user?u=53072343 **SAH Project GUI** is the full version of the GUI texture pack available on Patreon: https://patreon.com/user?u=53072343


💛 Thank you for supporting SAH Project
